mean,

mess.

The reason that our workflows, right, can deliver results consistently across all of our clients is because of the context that we engineered during the strategy sprint.
So, you know, you're also getting like an SEO audit from us during that time, but you're not actually logging into any platform with GrowthX.
We're using our internal platform, which is where we've built the workflows.
And then we are executing on the opportunities that we identify during the strategy sprint together.

Perfect.

our agency also uses AI to make content and does strategy.

That I think we still need to unlock.

To scale quality.
